hero.headline: Shahid, Watch iT & More —
hero.subheading: The first app built for watching Arabic streaming platforms with friends. Sync Shahid, Watch iT, and your favorite MENA content in real-time — perfectly synchronized.

features.heading: Built for
features.sync_desc: Works with Arabic streaming platforms out of the box. Watch Shahid MBC, Watch iT, and more — synced frame-by-frame.
features.rooms_desc: Create a room, share the code. Friends join in seconds — no accounts needed. Perfect for long-distance movie nights.
features.chat_desc: React in real-time with text chat and voice calls while watching your favorite Arabic shows together.
features.queue_desc: Line up episodes of your favorite مسلسل. The host controls the playlist — binge together.

how_it_works.heading: Up and running in
how_it_works.step1_desc: Get YallaSawa for Windows. Free, no sign-up.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Open Shahid, Watch iT, or any platform. Share the room code.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Everyone syncs automatically. Same scene, same second.

download_cta.heading: Ready to watch Shahid with friends?
download_cta.subheading: Download YallaSawa — the first app built for Arabic streaming watch parties.

about.heading: Built for the moments you share
about.subheading: We believe distance shouldn't stop you from watching together.
about.story_p1: It started with a simple frustration: trying to watch a مسلسل on Shahid with friends who live in different cities. The "3, 2, 1, play!" countdown over a voice call never worked — someone was always a few seconds behind.
about.story_p2: Existing solutions were clunky, browser-only, and none of them supported Arabic streaming platforms like Shahid or Watch iT. We wanted something that just works — real sync for the platforms the MENA region actually uses.
about.story_p3: So we built YallaSawa — Arabic for "let's go together." The first desktop app that syncs Shahid, Watch iT, and other Arabic platforms in real time. Supports protected content, built-in chat, and automatic latency compensation.
about.sync_desc: Sub-second synchronization with automatic latency compensation. Everyone sees the same frame at the same time.
about.drm_desc: Fully supports protected content from Shahid MBC, Watch iT, and other MENA streaming platforms. No other app does this.
about.setup_desc: No accounts, no sign-ups. Create a room, share the code, and your friends are in. That simple.
about.creator_desc: YallaSawa is an indie project built by a passionate developer who believes the best way to watch is together. It's free, it's in beta, and it's getting better every week.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subheading: Everything you need to know about YallaSawa.
faq.a_what_is: YallaSawa is the first free desktop app built for watching Arabic streaming platforms like Shahid and Watch iT together with friends. It synchronizes playback in real-time so everyone sees the same frame, with built-in chat and voice.
faq.a_install: Download the installer for Windows from our homepage. Run the setup file and follow the on-screen instructions — it takes less than a minute.
faq.a_platforms: Currently, YallaSawa is available for Windows. Android and iOS versions are planned for the future.
faq.a_free: Yes, YallaSawa is completely free to use during the beta period. There are no hidden fees, subscriptions, or in-app purchases.
faq.q_create_party: How do I create a watch party?
faq.a_create_party: Open the app, click 'Create Room', and you'll get a unique room code. Share that code with your friends — they can join by entering it in the app.
faq.a_sync: YallaSawa uses real-time WebSocket connections to synchronize play, pause, and seek events across all room members. It automatically measures network latency and compensates for it, so everyone stays in sync within fractions of a second.
faq.q_any_video: Can I use it with any video?
faq.a_any_video: YallaSawa is built for Arabic streaming platforms like Shahid MBC, Watch iT, and more. It also works with other video platforms. The host navigates to content, and all room members watch in perfect sync.
faq.a_queue: The queue lets the host line up multiple videos to watch in order. When one video ends, the next one in the queue starts automatically for everyone.
faq.a_drm: Many streaming platforms use DRM (Digital Rights Management) to protect their content. YallaSawa includes Widevine support so you can watch DRM-protected content from platforms like Shahid, WatchIT, and others.
faq.a_latency: YallaSawa measures the network latency between each member and the server, then compensates automatically. Most users experience sync accuracy within 100-200 milliseconds.
faq.a_secure: YallaSawa only collects what's necessary to run the service — display names, room codes, and chat messages. We don't store watch history or personal data. All communication happens over encrypted WebSocket connections.
faq.a_legal: Yes. YallaSawa does not host, store, or distribute any video content. It simply synchronizes playback timing between users who are each accessing content through their own accounts on legitimate streaming platforms.
faq.a_host_content: No. YallaSawa is a synchronization tool only. All video content is streamed directly from the original platforms to each user's device. We never intercept, store, or redistribute any media.
faq.a_data_collect: We collect display names, room codes, chat messages (temporarily, for delivery), and basic connection data (IP addresses for WebSocket connections). See our Privacy Policy for full details.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.summary: How we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.s1_intro: When you use YallaSawa, we collect limited information necessary to provide the service:
privacy.s1_display_names: The name you choose when joining a room.
privacy.s1_room_codes: Unique identifiers generated when rooms are created.
privacy.s1_chat_messages: Temporarily held in memory for real-time delivery, not permanently stored.
privacy.s1_connection_data: IP addresses and WebSocket connection metadata.
privacy.s1_analytics: Anonymous usage patterns such as room creation frequency.
privacy.s2_intro: We use collected information solely to operate and improve YallaSawa:
privacy.s2_no_sell: We do not sell, rent, or share your data with third parties for advertising.
privacy.s3_chat: held in memory only during active sessions.
privacy.s3_logs: retained up to 30 days for debugging.
privacy.s3_hosting: Server infrastructure is hosted on Railway (railway.app).
privacy.s4_metered: TURN server for WebRTC voice chat.
privacy.s5_text: You have the right to: access, deletion, correction, and portability of your data.
privacy.s6_text: YallaSawa is not intended for children under 13. Contact {email} if you believe a child has provided personal data.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.summary: The rules and guidelines for using YallaSawa.
terms.s1_text: By downloading, installing, or using YallaSawa, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the App.
terms.s2_text1: YallaSawa is a beta desktop application for synchronized video watching. Features include real-time playback sync, room-based parties, built-in chat, video queue, and voice chat.
terms.s2_text2: As beta software, features may change or be removed without notice.
terms.s3_item1: Share pirated or illegally obtained content
terms.s3_item4: Share illegal or harmful content in chat
terms.s4_text: YallaSawa does not host, store, or distribute any video content. It is a synchronization tool that coordinates playback timing between users accessing content through their own accounts.
terms.s5_text: YallaSawa is provided "AS IS" without warranties of any kind. As beta software, it may contain bugs and incomplete features.
terms.s6_text: To the maximum extent permitted by law, YallaSawa shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages.
terms.s7_text: We may suspend or terminate your access at any time. You may stop using the App by uninstalling it.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.summary: Important information about beta software limitations and liability.
disclaimer.s1_text1: YallaSawa is in beta. The software may contain bugs, features may change without notice, and data loss may occur.
disclaimer.s1_text2: By using the beta, you acknowledge and accept these limitations.
disclaimer.s2_text: YallaSawa is provided "AS IS" without warranties of any kind, express or implied.
disclaimer.s3_text: To the fullest extent permitted by law, YallaSawa and its developers shall not be liable for any damages arising from use of the App.
disclaimer.s4_text1: YallaSawa does not host, store, distribute, or control any video content. All videos are streamed from third-party platforms to each user's device.
disclaimer.s4_text2: Users are responsible for ensuring they have the right to access content they watch.
disclaimer.s5_text: YallaSawa includes Widevine CDM for compatibility with legitimate streaming platforms. It does not decrypt, copy, redistribute, or circumvent content protection.
disclaimer.s6_text: YallaSawa requires internet access. Server uptime, sync accuracy, and compatibility with all networks are not guaranteed.
disclaimer.s7_text: Your use of YallaSawa is at your own risk. Questions? Contact {legalEmail} or {supportEmail}.
